scripts.dev: sh -c 'if [ "${E2E_TOOLCHAIN:-vite}" = "rsbuild" ]; then pnpm exec rsbuild dev --port 3000; else pnpm exec vite dev --port 3000; fi'
scripts.build: sh -c 'if [ "${E2E_TOOLCHAIN:-vite}" = "rsbuild" ]; then pnpm exec rsbuild build && tsc --noEmit; else vite build && tsc --noEmit; fi'
scripts.test:e2e:mockMode: rm -rf node_modules/.vite; rm -rf port*.txt; playwright test --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:errorMode: rm -rf node_modules/.vite; rm -rf port*.txt; BEHAVIOR=error playwright test --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run test:e2e:mockMode && pnpm run test:e2e:errorMode
